visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a graphic-heavy intro featuring a large Costco Wholesale logo and a cartoon character on a white warehouse background. Large colorful text dominates the center, with promotional dates displayed at the bottom under bright, flat lighting. (2) The scene shifts to a warehouse setting with high shelving. A stack of purple Mayflower toilet paper packages is shown in a medium shot; the lighting is bright industrial white. (3) The camera cuts to red boxes of egg rolls stacked on a pallet, followed by a close-up of Coca-Cola bottles in plastic-wrapped cases. (4) The sequence continues with various refrigerated food items: raw beef slices on white trays, pork belly in plastic packaging, skewers of squid, and fillets of lightly salted mackerel, all displayed under the cool white light of refrigerator cases. (5) Transition to dry goods and snacks: boxes of SUN FOOD sausages, containers of Thai seafood salad, and Kinder Bueno chocolate bars. The camera remains mostly static for each product shot. (6) Further products are showcased including boxes of pomelos, packs of Taiwanese pork sausages, boxes of 'if' coconut water, and large bags of marshmallows. (7) The final segments display non-food items like Levi's jeans and Welhome towels, followed by more beverages and snacks like S.Pellegrino water, yogurt, and coffee packs, maintaining a consistent fast-paced editing style with centered text overlays.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male narrator appears briefly at the beginning.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male with short black hair wearing a casual shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse store with high industrial shelving, pallets of goods, and refrigerated display cases.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, upbeat electronic pop BGM featuring a steady 4/4 drum machine beat. A clear, enthusiastic male voice speaks rapidly in Traditional Chinese, introducing the 'Costco Weekly Special.' Short 'whoosh' and digital 'blip' SFX are heard synchronously with visual transitions. (2) As the video proceeds, the male narrator continuously lists product names and their corresponding discount prices with high pitch variability and clear articulation. The BGM remains constant in the background, providing a driving rhythmic floor. (3) Each new product segment is punctuated by a subtle percussive hit or transition sound effect, maintaining a hyper-dense information delivery. The vocal intensity is high, characteristic of professional retail narration. (4) The audio concludes with a final energetic pitch for the last products shown, with the music maintaining its tempo until a quick fade-out at the very end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Sequence of Items -> Implicit End
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To quickly inform Costco members about the specific products on sale for the week of September 22nd to 28th, using a fast-paced 'speed-run' format to maximize information density and encourage viewers to visit the store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly lists Costco sale prices and features the Costco logo prominently.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-frequency cutting technique common in short-form social media marketing to showcase over 40 products in 90 seconds. The consistent use of yellow and white high-contrast text overlays ensures readability at a fast pace.
